content: Step-wise Generalized Reward Preference Optimization (GRPO) can be repurposed as a curiosity-driven ranking signal for filtering and storing only high-information-gain episodic memories in a 2025 transformer agent, replacing static memory pruning heuristics with reward-aligned memory retention that adapts to the agent's active learning goals. This creates an intrinsically motivated memory pipeline where only surprising, plan-relevant past experiences are preserved for future episodic planning.
